headline: Stocks Are Still Expensive by This Standard
summary: Wall Street often uses the ratio of a company’s share price to its projected earnings over the next 12 months as a barometer of whether the stock is pricey or cheap. Investors might be fretting about war, spooked by oil prices, and bummed over the dwindling possibility of rate cuts.

headline: Superstar Storage and Memory Stocks
